## Meeting Purpose

[Weekend closeout and alignment on key action items for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Event planner retainer: Aim for $3-5K/month, covering \~1 event/month; approve if under $5K](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Tiago renewal: Internal pitch ready; Marcel to meet directly with Tiago](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Monday dinner canceled: Urgent communication needed to minimize impact on customer relationships](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [Fundraising prep: Create reference list, send gifts, and prepare employee dossiers](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)

## Topics

### Event Planner Engagement

  - [Waiting on Gabriella's response for retainer fee](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Estimated fair range: $3-5K/month for \~1 event/month](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Breakdown: \~10 hours/event @ $200/hr = $2K, plus value of network](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Next steps: If within range, Marcel approves; Bridget handles if Marcel unavailable](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Scope: 4 total events (1 upcoming mixer + 3 future)](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Venues: Start at GrowthX office, scale to larger spaces as needed](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)

### Tiago Renewal Strategy

  - [Internal team prepared pitch for new content over next 10 months](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Proposal includes: Newsletter build-out, programmatic SEO/GEO, content repackaging (newsletter, video, webinars), and refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Marcel to meet directly with Tiago, texted to check his availability](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)

### Monday Dinner Cancellation

  - [Urgent: Need to cancel ASAP to minimize negative impact](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)

  - [Concern: Tiago was hoping to network with Karan](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Action: George to work with Jason on smooth cancellation communication](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)

  - [Prepare employee dossiers: Work with Rand for professional presentation](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [KTA to enhance employee photos (crop backgrounds, ensure consistent quality)](https://fathom.video/share/xofmTXaa7KR5zPAUCPj2MJviB6mVaJiU?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
